# Milk

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Milk;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Milk { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
lactose, bottle, beverage, drink, water, diet

food-beverage
